title: Careers
hero: Join the Heeb Al Fakher Team
description: We are looking for passionate talents to be part of our journey. This page is currently under development, but you can still reach us via email or WhatsApp.
sendCVDesc: Don't have an account? You can send your CV directly via email or contact us on WhatsApp.
underDevelopmentDesc: We're improving the application experience. For now, you can apply by sending your CV or reaching out on WhatsApp.
